channel.title: Continuous-Integration on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Continuous-Integration on Arrans github.io

item.title: localstack/localstack
item.description: 💻 A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: An open-source runtime for composable workflows. Great for AI agents and CI/CD.

item.title: gcarreno/setup-lazarus
item.description: Set up your GitHub Actions workflow with a specific version of Lazarus

item.title: ligurio/awesome-ci
item.description: The list of continuous integration services and tools

item.title: bleenco/abstruse
item.description: Abstruse is a free and open-source CI/CD platform that tests your models and code.
